name: Loyce Grinberryall
alt_names: ロイス・グリンベリオール
description: Loyce Grinberryall was the King of the Spade Kingdom, alongside his wife Ciel Grinberryall, untill the Zogratis Siblings attacked the palace and overthrew the royal family. ~!It is later revealed by Ralph Niaflem, that he is the father of Yuno.!~
